title: City with powiat rights

infobox.value: ([Polish](/wiki/Polish_language "Polish language"): *miasto na prawach powiatu*) is in [Poland](/wiki/Poland "Poland") a designation denoting 66 of the 107 cities (the [urban gminas](/wiki/Urban_gmina "Urban gmina") which are governed by a city mayor or *prezydent miasta*) which exercise also the powers and duties of a [county](/wiki/Powiat "Powiat") ([Polish](/wiki/Polish_language "Polish language"): *powiat*), thus being an [independent city](/wiki/Independent_city "Independent city").[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2) They have roughly the same status as former [county boroughs](/wiki/County_borough "County borough") in the [United Kingdom](/wiki/United_Kingdom "United Kingdom").
["Dz.U. z 1998 r. nr 91, poz. 578 (Sjem of the RP)"](http://isap.sejm.gov.pl/DetailsServlet?id=WDU19980910578) (in Polish). Retrieved 2011-04-16.

[Central Statistical Office](/wiki/Central_Statistical_Office_(Poland) "Central Statistical Office (Poland)") (2 January 2018). ["Baza TERYT: Wyszukiwanie"](http://eteryt.stat.gov.pl/eTeryt/rejestr_teryt/udostepnianie_danych/baza_teryt/uzytkownicy_indywidualni/wyszukiwanie/wyszukiwanie.aspx) [TERYT Database: Search] (in Polish). Select "miasta na prawach powiatu" from "kategoria/rodzaj" and press "Wyszukaj". Retrieved 1 September 2018.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Polish counties with city rights

A **city with powiat rights** ([Polish](/wiki/Polish_language "Polish language"): *miasto na prawach powiatu*) is in [Poland](/wiki/Poland "Poland") a designation denoting 66 of the 107 cities (the [urban gminas](/wiki/Urban_gmina "Urban gmina") which are governed by a city mayor or *prezydent miasta*) which exercise also the powers and duties of a [county](/wiki/Powiat "Powiat") ([Polish](/wiki/Polish_language "Polish language"): *powiat*), thus being an [independent city](/wiki/Independent_city "Independent city").[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2) They have roughly the same status as former [county boroughs](/wiki/County_borough "County borough") in the [United Kingdom](/wiki/United_Kingdom "United Kingdom").

Sometimes, such a city will also be referred to in Polish as city county ([Polish](/wiki/Polish_language "Polish language"): *powiat grodzki*); this term however is not official (it was used during the interwar times of the [Second Polish Republic](/wiki/Second_Polish_Republic "Second Polish Republic")). The contemporary term *city with powiat rights* should not be used interchangeably with the interwar *city county*.

Such cities are distinct from and independent of the 314 regular powiats (sometimes referred as 'land counties' ([Polish](/wiki/Polish_language "Polish language"): *powiaty ziemskie*), again a term that was used in the interwar period and is not used in modern Polish law).
